allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f""Stars: {d[''''stargazers_count'''']}\\nForks: {d[''''forks_count'''']}\\nOpen issues: {d[''''open_issues_count'''']}\\nCreated: {d[''''created_at'''']}\\nPushed: {d[''''pushed_at'''']}\\nUpdated: {d[''''updated_at'''']}\\nFork: {d[''''fork'''']}\\nParent: {d.get\(''''parent'''',{}\).get\(''''full_name'''',''''N/A''''\)}\\nDefault branch: {d[''''default_branch'''']}\\nArchived: {d[''''archived'''']}""\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; issues=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total issues/PRs: {len\(issues\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  #{i[number]} [{i[state]}] {i[title]}''''\) for i in issues[:10]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f""Original repo stars: {d[''''stargazers_count'''']}\\nForks: {d[''''forks_count'''']}\\nOpen issues: {d[''''open_issues_count'''']}\\nPushed: {d[''''pushed_at'''']}\\nArchived: {d[''''archived'''']}""\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; issues=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''  #{i[""number""]} {i[""title""]}''''\) for i in issues[:10]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; commits=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{c[""sha""][:8]} {c[""commit""][""author""][""date""]} {c[""commit""][""message""][:80]}''''\) for c in commits]")

Bash(rm -f box.glb cone.glb cone-flat.glb debris-*.glb wheel-*.glb kart-*.glb tractor.glb tractor-police.glb tractor-shovel.glb ambulance.glb firetruck.glb garbage-truck.glb delivery.glb delivery-flat.glb truck-flat.glb)
